title: angelica hohuanshanensis
intro: Angelica hohuanshanensis, also known as Qīng Huáng Shān Gāo Bǎi Xiè, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family, native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial properties, as well as its ability to improve digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and flu. The health benefits of Angelica hohuanshanensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as cardiovascular disease and certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Angelica hohuanshanensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
